Settings

AI Providers

RetinaTag routes images to the cheapest available provider automatically.

Monthly Budget
Set 0 for unlimited. AI tagging stops when budget is exceeded.
Watch Folders

Welcome to RetinaTag

AI-powered photo tagging with smart multi-provider routing.
Your library, analyzed — beautifully.

🧠

5 AI Providers

Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Grok and local Qwen2.5-VL free.

🌍

Any Language

Search in Turkish, Japanese, Arabic — auto-translates.

⚡

Smart Routing

Always picks the cheapest provider. Near-zero cost.

🗺

GPS Map & EXIF

See where photos were taken. Full EXIF metadata.

1
Add API keys in Settings or use free local Qwen2.5-VL
2
Click Add Folder or drop images onto the window
3
Hit Tag with AI and watch your library come alive

🏷 Tag Manager

📷 EXIF Data

📦 Export Library

Export all photos and tags to a file. Choose format:

Creates .xmp files next to each photo — compatible with Lightroom, Capture One, Bridge.
